windows.command: if (Test-Path .venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1) { . .venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1 } elseif (Test-Path ..\vui\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1) { . ..\vui\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1 } elseif (Test-Path venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1) { . venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1 }; python server.py

tasks.label: 🛑 Stop Demo
tasks.command: PID=$(lsof -ti :5002 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$PID" ]; then kill -9 $PID; fi; echo 'Cockpit (port 5002) stopped.'

windows.command: $p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5002 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if ($p) { $p | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host 'Cockpit (port 5002) stopped.' } else { Write-Host 'No listener on port 5002.' }
